name: Error Recovery Protocol
description: Handle errors and edge cases gracefully
prompt:
Handle analysis errors and edge cases:

1. Malformed code handling - attempt partial analysis
2. Unknown language detection and best-effort analysis
3. Token limit exceeded - prioritize critical findings
4. Ambiguous code - state assumptions clearly
5. Missing context - request specific information
6. Conflicting patterns - explain trade-offs

Never fail silently. Always provide actionable feedback.
